'''kagugu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:scaliola|scaliola]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-g-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:scaliola|scaliola]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| kagugu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kægigith|kægigith]] || [[word:kægigij|kægigij]] || [[word:kægigish|kægigish]] || [[word:kægigi|kægigi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kaguguguth|kaguguguth]] || [[word:kaguguguj|kaguguguj]] || [[word:kagugugush|kagugugush]] || [[word:kagugugu|kagugugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kaguguth|kaguguth]] || [[word:kaguguj|kaguguj]] || [[word:kagugush|kagugush]] || [[word:kagugu|kagugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kagufguth|kagufguth]] || [[word:kagufguj|kagufguj]] || [[word:kagufgush|kagufgush]] || [[word:kagufguf|kagufguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kaguguthu|kaguguthu]] || [[word:kaguguju|kaguguju]] || [[word:kagugushu|kagugushu]] || [[word:kaguguku|kaguguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kaguguth|kaguguth]] || [[word:kaguguj|kaguguj]] || [[word:kagugush|kagugush]] || [[word:kagugu|kagugu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kaguguthul|kaguguthul]] || [[word:kagugujul|kagugujul]] || [[word:kagugushul|kagugushul]] || [[word:kagugukul|kagugukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kaguguthuthu|kaguguthuthu]] || [[word:kagugujuju|kagugujuju]] || [[word:kagugushushu|kagugushushu]] || [[word:kaguguku|kaguguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kaguguthun|kaguguthun]] || [[word:kagugujun|kagugujun]] || [[word:kagugushun|kagugushun]] || [[word:kagugukun|kagugukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kaguguthuoro|kaguguthuoro]] || [[word:kagugujuoro|kagugujuoro]] || [[word:kagugushuoro|kagugushuoro]] || [[word:kagugukuoro|kagugukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
